footnotes.F1: This transaction was executed in multiple trades at prices ranging from $113.12 to $114.11. The price set forth above reflects the weighted-average price per share. The reporting person hereby undertakes to provide upon request to the SEC staff, the issuer, or a security holder of the issuer full information regarding the number of shares and prices at which the transactions were effected.
